title: Gendos Big Empty Office
wikitext:
[]: Gendos Big Empty Office!             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Fri May 27, 2005 8:22 am Ok, I know that the System Sephiroticm is on the ceiling of Gendos office, but does anyone know what the symbol on the floor is? Also, why the heck is his office so fecking big? He doesn't even have anything on his table. Scene - Gendo, alone in his office. Gendo: ......* * Gendo: ......? Gendo: ......I'm bored :x . Gendo: ......? Gendo: ......*shouts* ECHO... *his voice reverberates heavily throughout the room* Gendo: ......Sweet :) !

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 27, 2005 8:40 am http://www.animenation.net/forums/showpost.php?p=3504649&postcount=80

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Fri May 27, 2005 8:48 am Could be. Are there any other pictures of Gendos Floor around?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri May 27, 2005 11:27 am DirtyHamster wrote: Could be. Are there any other pictures of Gendos Floor around?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Fri May 27, 2005 11:37 am Nutts. Does anyone out there have a detailed image of Gendos floor cause I'm still not 100% sure. Pleasssseee. I'm on my knees if that helps. ...crap......that sounds really bad. Ahh well. What's typed is typed.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri May 27, 2005 3:45 pm It wasn't this, was it? (I don't have my DVDs.) [url]http://www.nachtkabarett.com/occult/darkcircling.jpg[/url] EDIT: HE won't let me link to the image; it only goes to his frontpage. I meant the spiral with the triangle (Alchemy & Kaballah; scroll down).

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Fri May 27, 2005 3:48 pm Ahhh Crap :x . I'm in a internet cafÃ© at the mo and it's not showing what you posted. Thanks for the effort though. Appreciated

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Fri May 27, 2005 3:50 pm Wait wait it justed pooped up. My fuck up. Ehhh, that's not quite it......but I like it. MM fan. Are We?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Fri May 27, 2005 3:54 pm Play with that site and you'll see why.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 8:44 am Where's this Hexon.Arq wrote: spiral with the triangle

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon May 30, 2005 12:04 am I'm having trouble linking to anything but the front page. I'm sure there are numerous other sites with the image, but I'm lazy. Enter > "Alchemy and Kaballah" > (scroll) "The BLOODSTAINED EGG & EDEN EYE"
